target.baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-backend-profile2 cargo bench -p fj-backend-cpu --bench backend_baseline -- --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1
target.rebench_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass68-backend-bench cargo bench -p fj-backend-cpu --bench backend_baseline -- backend_scheduler_shapes/branched_fanin --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1

lever.summary: Detect terminal single-output scalar I64 Add DAGs and evaluate them with dense VarId-indexed slots instead of per-equation HashMap<Value> lookups plus generic primitive evaluation.

isomorphism.ordering: Accepted DAGs process equations in source order and only use a VarId after it is present in the dense slot table.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Ready-wave metadata is reconstructed by dependency level; multi-output and visible-intermediate programs fall back to the existing scheduler.
isomorphism.floating_point: No floating-point equations are accepted by the fast path.
isomorphism.integer_semantics: I64 addition uses wrapping_add, matching the existing runtime overflow behavior and verified with i64::MAX fan-in.
isomorphism.errors: Sparse VarIds, missing inputs, non-Add primitives, params, effects, sub-jaxprs, malformed equations, nonterminal segments, and multi-output programs keep the existing scheduler/evaluator path.

focused_tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass68-backend-tests3 cargo test -p fj-backend-cpu dependency_scheduler -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass68-backend-fulltest cargo test -p fj-backend-cpu -- --nocapture

quality_gates.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass68-backend-check cargo check -p fj-backend-cpu --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass68-backend-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-backend-cpu --all-targets -- -D warnings

quality_gates.result: pass: exit 0, critical 0; existing warning inventory remains
